series_metadata.series_description: May include, but not necessarily limited to: service records, operations maintenace reports, operating manual, repair records, and usage logs.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain during period of vehicle ownership, then destroy, or send file with vehicle, if vehicle retired to DAS salvage. ; Electronic: Retain during period of vehicle ownership, then destroy, or send file with vehicle, if vehicle retired to DAS salvage., Paper: Shred ; Electronic: Delete
